sections.heading: Plasma / PRP Therapy
sections.text: Chapter ∞. ✦ THERAPEUTIC · FACE & HAIR Plasma / PRP Therapy Bright Specialized Clinics is a ten-department medical centre in Al Khobar, Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia, on Prince Faisal Bin Fahd Road in Al Hada district since 2018. Senior clinicians include Dr. Hassan Nazzal (maxillofacial, RCSI Fellowship) and Dr. Marina Naddaf (dermatology, AAD member since 2004). Same-day WhatsApp confirmation on 0557337555 · unified hotline 920024428.
